entity.label: Anathoth
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: The name of one of the cities of refuge, in the tribe of Benjamin (Josh. 21:18). The Jews, as a rule, did not change the names of the towns they found in Palestine; hence this town

verses.text: Anathoth with her suburbs, and Almon with her suburbs; four cities.

And unto Abiathar the priest said the king, Get thee to Anathoth, unto thine own fields; for thou art worthy of death: but I will not at this time put thee to death, because thou barest the ark of the Lord GOD before David my father, and because thou hast been afflicted in all wherein my father was afflicted.
And out of the tribe of Benjamin; Geba with her suburbs, and Alemeth with her suburbs, and Anathoth with her suburbs. All their cities throughout their families were thirteen cities.
The ninth captain for the ninth month was Abiezer the Anetothite, of the Benjamites: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.
The men of Anathoth, an hundred twenty and eight.
The men of Anathoth, an hundred twenty and eight.
Lift up thy voice, O daughter of Gallim: cause it to be heard unto Laish, O poor Anathoth.
